en.name_en: Old Stone Monuments of Minami Anrakuji
en.description_en: A group of old stone monuments at Minami Anrakuji, classified as a monument (historic site). It is municipally designated by the city of Tagajō, designated on 1973-12-18. Located at Nitta aza Minami Anrakuji, Tagajō, Miyagi Prefecture.
